results.title: Autonomous Research Strategist Trial

results.title: UCI Auto MPG Public Dataset Quality Audit
results.humanReadableSummary: A public-safe audit of the UCI Auto MPG dataset found 398 rows, 9 fields, 6 missing horsepower tokens, no full-row duplicates, and a type-aware audit that outperformed schema-only checks for missing-value detection.
results.summary: A public-safe audit of the UCI Auto MPG dataset found 398 rows, 9 fields, 6 missing horsepower tokens, no full-row duplicates, and a type-aware audit that outperformed schema-only checks for missing-value detection.
